title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech examines whether Google engineers use "vibe coding" practices, comparing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities and speculating on Google's code generation adoption across 2024-2026. The video explores what constitutes vibe coding and its prevalence at major tech companies.
